creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: gerald
Date: Mon May 12 10:21:53 2014
New Revision: 353794
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353794
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353794/

Log:
  - Support staging.
  - Add LICENSE (APACHE20).
  - Tweak WWW line in pkg-descr.
  
  PR:		188598
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>
  Approved by:	portmgr (blanket pre-approval)

Modified:
  head/converters/py-pisa/Makefile
  head/converters/py-pisa/pkg-descr

Modified: head/converters/py-pisa/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/converters/py-pisa/Makefile	Mon May 12 10:15:07 2014	(r353793)
+++ head/converters/py-pisa/Makefile	Mon May 12 10:21:53 2014	(r353794)
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	wen@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	PDF generator using HTML and CSS
 
+LICENSE=	APACHE20
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}html5lib>=0.11.1:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-html5lib \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}reportlab2>=2.1:${PORTSDIR}/print/py-reportlab2 \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}imaging>=0.1:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/py-imaging \
@@ -18,5 +20,4 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}html
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/converters/py-pisa/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/converters/py-pisa/pkg-descr	Mon May 12 10:15:07 2014	(r353793)
+++ head/converters/py-pisa/pkg-descr	Mon May 12 10:21:53 2014	(r353794)
@@ -7,4 +7,4 @@ templates very quickly without learning 
 integration into Python frameworks like CherryPy, KID Templating,
 TurboGears, Django, Zope, Plone, Google AppEngine (GAE) etc.
 
-WWW:	http://www.xhtml2pdf.com/
+WWW: http://www.xhtml2pdf.com
